name: io.github.codespar/mcp-caf
description: Caf — BR identity + trust platform: KYC/KYB, face authentication + liveness, document validation + OCR, Trust Platform orchestration

environment_variables.name: CAF_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key from the Caf dashboard

tools.name: person_check
tools.description: KYC — validate CPF + return restrictions + risk indicators

tools.name: company_check
tools.description: KYB — validate CNPJ + return corporate profile + QSA + sanctions

tools.name: face_authentication
tools.description: Face authentication against a base image with liveness

tools.name: document_check
tools.description: OCR + authenticity check on RG / CNH / passport / proof of residence

tools.name: trust_platform_start
tools.description: Start a Trust Platform onboarding flow with hosted URL

tools.name: trust_platform_get
tools.description: Get Trust Platform flow status + step verdicts

tools.name: list_datasources
tools.description: List datasources available to your Caf account

tools.name: get_check_result
tools.description: Retrieve a previously-run check by ID
